description_long: This house features a single-story layout with a prominent terracotta-tiled gable roof covering a front porch area, which is enclosed by a green picket fence. The exterior walls are finished in white, giving the structure a clean and modern appearance. The front porch is supported by wooden posts and provides a sheltered outdoor space, while the main entryway is set back behind the fence. Windows are modestly sized and asymmetrically placed, with a mix of rectangular and square shapes visible on different sides. The rear and side elevations are more utilitarian, with minimal window openings and a simple white door providing secondary access. The overall design suggests a Mediterranean or Spanish-influenced style, with an emphasis on outdoor living and privacy.
description: A single-story white house with a terracotta-tiled gable roof, green picket fence, and a covered front porch. The design is clean and modern with Mediterranean influences and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the terracotta-tiled roof, green picket fence, and covered porch area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain white wall, a secondary door, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view with simple white walls, small windows, and no visible decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extension of the tiled roof and the porch area partially visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door set behind a green picket fence and covered porch with terracotta-tiled roof and wooden posts.
